violations.text: One of two public restrooms were out of service prior to inspection. Toilet was observed clogged. No sewage backup observed. PIC states work order is in place. Plumbing system to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
3 bay sink was observed leaking. Plumbing system to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Refuse area observed with an accumulation of litter. Area to be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -floors under equipment and fixtures -ceiling vent grates -ceiling in walk-in cooler -floor drains The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025
Opening observed where soda lines are fed through wall in drive thru area. The physical facilities to be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. behind and under dining room soda dispenser 2. cold holding unit (ice accumulation) New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

Enclosure for refuse area was observed with an accumulation of litter and leaf litter. Area to maintained cleaned and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023
Large amount of ice buildup observed in the hood of kitchen prep station. Ice shall be broken down. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
